title: Safe Merge Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for the safe merge flow. Child beads deliver the new `merge-conflict` bead type, merge/test preflight logic, TUI CLI redirection, validation, documentation, and final review.
acceptance_criteria: `orchestrator merge <id>` merges `main` into the feature branch before the final `git merge --no-ff` unless `--skip-rebase` is used.
Merge conflicts and post-merge test failures create `merge-conflict` beads with actionable context instead of leaving the operator in a conflicted state.
`max_corrective_attempts` is enforced for merge-conflict iterations and the operator receives a clear escalation path when the cap is reached.
The TUI no longer performs merges inline and directs operators to `orchestrator merge <id>` from the CLI.
Automated tests and operator-facing docs cover the new merge flow and config knobs.
